subject: UPDATE: Liberty Oil & Propane is NOT a Railway app — do not monitor or redeploy
body:
OWL — Jay clarified the Liberty Oil & Propane situation. Heads up:

- libertyoilandpropane.com is hosted on a separate service Jay has used for years
- It's a single HTML file — no backend, no Railway needed
- It was returning 404 on Railway (liberty-oil-propane.up.railway.app) which means the Railway project is either dead or never properly set up
- Jay says to leave it alone — he'll handle it manually
- Keep the GitHub repo intact for backup/version control, but DO NOT redeploy to Railway
- Remove it from your uptime monitoring if you're checking it

Freed up one item from the "apps to fix" list.

— Bull 🦉
